name: foqos
desc: Foqos allows you to lock apps behind the tap of a NFC tag or scan of a QR code. Free and open source alternative to Brick, Opal, ScreenZen, Unpluq, Blok and mo…
descFull: Foqos allows you to lock apps behind the tap of a NFC tag or scan of a QR code. Free and open source alternative to Brick, Opal, ScreenZen, Unpluq, Blok and more!
